query:
-- Fix 1: UCXcel Webex Basic → $0.00 (pricebook confirmed $0.00)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 0.00, costSource = 'sasboss_pricebook', updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND status != 'terminated'
  AND billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND monthlyCost != 0.00;

-- Fix 2: All other zero-cost UCaaS/Managed Voice products from pricebook
-- (Call Centre Queue with Time of Day Routing, Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex,
--  UCXcel Call Centre Queue, UCXcel Hunt Group, UCXcel Basic Queue Agent,
--  UCXcel Auto-Attendant, UCXcel Voicemail User, UCXcel Premium Queue Agent,
--  UCXcel Virtual Park User, SMS Gateway Instance, Essentials, Lite)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 0.00, costSource = 'sasboss_pricebook', updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName IN (
  'Call Centre Queue with Time of Day Routing',
  'Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex',
  'UCXcel Call Centre Queue',
  'UCXcel Hunt Group',
  'UCXcel Basic Queue Agent',
  'UCXcel Auto-Attendant',
  'UCXcel Voicemail User',
  'UCXcel Premium Queue Agent',
  'UCXcel Virtual Park User',
  'SMS Gateway Instance',
  'Essentials',
  'Lite',
  'UCXcel Basic Queue Agent',
  'Webex Softphone',
  'UCXcel Basic Queue Agent'
)
  AND status != 'terminated'
  AND billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND monthlyCost != 0.00;

-- Fix 3: DID Australia (1) hosting services → $0.20 (DID Hosting rate, not Porting rate)
-- All DID Australia services have wbProductType=did-number so they are hosting, not porting
UPDATE services s
SET s.monthlyCost = 0.20, s.costSource = 'sasboss_pricebook', s.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE s.planName = 'DID Australia (1)'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND s.monthlyCost != 0.20;

-- Fix 4: DID Australia (10) hosting → $2.00
UPDATE services s
SET s.monthlyCost = 2.00, s.costSource = 'sasboss_pricebook', s.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE s.planName = 'DID Australia (10)'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND s.monthlyCost != 2.00;

-- Fix 5: DID Australia (100) hosting → $20.00
UPDATE services s
SET s.monthlyCost = 20.00, s.costSource = 'sasboss_pricebook', s.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE s.planName = 'DID Australia (100)'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
  AND s.monthlyCost != 20.00;
